EmailTemplate.name: AES - Rejected Document
EmailTemplate.subject: You need to update one of your documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
REJECTED DOCUMENT.
Hi {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Contact__c},
The {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Document__c} document has been rejected due to the following reason: {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.Rejection_Reason__c}.
Please follow the link below to update the document and proceed with your application. The {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Document__c} document is marked with a red dot on the list.
UPDATE MY DOCUMENTATION
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
